source.text:
-- Pattern forms: constructors, tuples, records, literals, guards, views.
type Point = Point { x: Int, y: Int }

type Shape = Dot | Line(Point, Point) | Poly(List(Point))

pattern Diag(n) for Point =
  view \(p) -> if p.x == p.y then Some(p.x) else None
  make \(n) -> Point { x = n, y = n }

fn classify(s : Shape) : Int =
  match s of
    Dot => 0
    Line(Point { x = 0, y = 0 }, _) => 1
    Line(a, b) if a.x == b.x => 2
    Poly(Nil) => 3
    Poly(Cons(p, Nil)) => p.x
    _ => 9

fn literals(v : Int, c : Char, f : Float, b : Bool) : Int =
  match (v, c, f, b) of
    (0, 'a', 1.5, true) => 1
    (n, _, _, false) => n
    _ => 2

fn record_rest(p : Point) : Int =
  match p of
    Point { x = 0, .. } => 0
    Point { x = x, y = y } => x + y

fn views(p : Point) : Int =
  match p of
    Diag(n) if n > 3 => n * 2
    Diag(n) => n
    _ => 0
